visual_direction.reference_energy: Apple product launch films (e.g., MacBook Pro 'Shot on iPhone') — clean, high-contrast, slow-motion detail shots
visual_direction.color_bias: Neutral greys with selective gold (#C9A84C) for spec callouts and CTA
visual_direction.motion_style: Slow push-ins, macro sweeps, and precise cuts. No handheld shakiness. Minimal transitions (cuts only).

shot_list.subject: Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) holding Royal Pop case, side view
shot_list.action: Slow push-in from medium to extreme close-up, focusing on the 0.7mm retaining lip and 40.35mm socket contact point
shot_list.framing: Centered, shallow depth of field (DOF < 1mm). Royal Pop case partially inserted into adapter, lip visible
shot_list.must_capture: 40.35mm socket, 0.7mm retaining lip, FKM rubber texture. Use IMG-01 as reference for composition and lighting. Add HERO_PUSH_IN motion (10% zoom over 3s).

shot_list.subject: Exploded view of adapter specs with caliper measurements
shot_list.action: Orthographic sweep from top to side view, caliper jaws closing on 0.7mm lip
shot_list.framing: Flat lay, grid background (1mm spacing). Caliper jaws must be sharp and realistic
shot_list.must_capture: 40.35mm socket diameter, 0.7mm lip thickness, 22mm lug width. Use IMG-02 as reference. Add SPEC_CALLOUT_MOTION (caliper jaws animate to 0.7mm).

shot_list.subject: Extreme close-up of FKM rubber texture and 0.7mm lip edge
shot_list.action: Raking light sweep (45° angle) to highlight micro-shadows in FKM grain
shot_list.framing: 10x magnification, DOF < 0.5mm. Lip edge facing camera with slight tilt
shot_list.must_capture: FKM rubber grain, 0.7mm lip edge, crown notch geometry. Use IMG-03 as reference. Add MACRO_SWEEP motion (light source moves 10° during shot).

shot_list.subject: Royal Pop case clicking into Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome)
shot_list.action: Slow-motion (120fps) of case insertion, focus on lip engagement
shot_list.framing: Side view, shallow DOF. Case angled 15° forward for lip visibility
shot_list.must_capture: Satisfying 'click' moment, 0.7mm lip securing the case. No reference asset — must be newly shot. Use hard side lighting to emphasize texture.

shot_list.subject: Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) on wrist with standard 22mm strap
shot_list.action: Static shot, wrist angled to show lug width and strap compatibility
shot_list.framing: Wrist centered, adapter parallel to camera. Strap must be visible but not distracting
shot_list.must_capture: 22mm lug width, FKM rubber on wrist. No reference asset — must be newly shot. Use neutral grey background (RGB 120,120,120).

shot_list.subject: All five colourways in a single frame
shot_list.action: Quick montage (1s per colourway), push-in to Monochrome
shot_list.framing: Grid layout (2x3), Monochrome centered. Each adapter angled 30° to show lip
shot_list.must_capture: Monochrome, Arctic Blue, Cobalt Orange, Green Eight, Otto Rosso. Use IMG-04 as reference. Add COLOURWAY_MONTAGE motion (1s per colourway, 10% zoom on Monochrome).

shot_list.subject: Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) with Pre-Order Now CTA
shot_list.action: Static shot, adapter centered with gold (#C9A84C) CTA text overlay
shot_list.framing: Top-down view, adapter filling 80% of frame. Text safe area top 20%
shot_list.must_capture: Adapter in Monochrome, clean background (RGB 10,10,10). No reference asset — must be newly shot. Use flat lighting to avoid shadows on text.

edit_plan.edit_instruction: Open with Shot 1 (HERO_PUSH_IN). Overlay hook text: '40.35mm. 0.7mm. Exact fit.' (gold #C9A84C, centered top 20%). Hold for 3s.
Cut to Shot 2 (SPEC_CALLOUT_MOTION). Overlay text: '40.35mm socket' (left) and '0.7mm retaining lip' (right). Sync caliper jaws to '0.7mm' text appearance. Hold for 3s.
Cut to Shot 3 (MACRO_SWEEP). Overlay text: 'FKM rubber' (bottom center). Hold for 3s.
Cut to Shot 4 (click-in shot). No text. Audio: subtle 'click' sound effect. Hold for 2s.
Cut to Shot 5 (wrist shot). Overlay text: '22mm lug width' (bottom center). Hold for 2s.
Cut to Shot 6 (COLOURWAY_MONTAGE). Overlay text: 'Five colourways' (top center). Cycle through colourways at 1s intervals. Push-in to Monochrome at 0:18. Hold Monochrome for 1s.
Cut to Shot 7 (CTA shot). Overlay text: 'Pre-Order Now' (gold #C9A84C, centered) + 'First batch only.' (white, below). Hold for 3s. Add subtle zoom (5%) for emphasis.

asset_requirements.description: Slow-motion (120fps) of Royal Pop case clicking into Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome). Side view, hard side lighting. Focus on lip engagement. 2s duration.
asset_requirements.purpose: Satisfying proof of fit and security.

asset_requirements.description: Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) on wrist with standard 22mm strap. Medium shot, neutral grey background. 2s duration.
Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) top-down view for CTA. Clean background (RGB 10,10,10). 3s duration.

asset_requirements.motion: COLOURWAY_MONTAGE (1s per colourway, 10% zoom on Monochrome).

briefs.cover_frame_direction: Use Shot 1 (IMG-01 with HERO_PUSH_IN motion). Frame must show 40.35mm socket, 0.7mm lip, and FKM texture. Overlay hook text: '40.35mm. 0.7mm. Exact fit.' (gold #C9A84C, top 20%).
briefs.subtitle_style: Gold #C9A84C, Futura Medium, 24pt, centered, drop shadow (black, 50% opacity, 2px offset). Max 2 lines per subtitle. Sync to voiceover or on-screen text.
briefs.handoff_for_manual_reel: Shoot in 4K 60fps (slow-motion shots at 120fps). Use tripod for all shots. Lighting: hard side light for texture, flat light for specs. Backgrounds: neutral grey (RGB 120,120,180) or black (RGB 0,0,0). Avoid reflections on FKM rubber. Edit in 9:16 (1080x1920). Audio: subtle 'click' sound effect for insertion shot. Music: minimalist electronic (e.g., 'Aperture' by Hammock).

website_truth.verified_disclaimer: Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Swatch Group Ltd or Audemars Piguet.
